featuredContent.title: pUSD: No Counterparty, No Ceiling
featuredContent.description: How pUSD delivers counterparty-free yield that scales alongside protocol adoption and the developing ecosystem supporting it.

featuredContent.title: Sustaining the Ecosystem: pETH & pUSD Flows
featuredContent.description: Polaris replaces emission-based incentives with an autonomous protocol-revenue distribution mechanism that flows to participants based on their asset holdings — no governance-driven allocation, no bribery.

milestones.title: Polaris introduces self-scaling stablecoin operating system
milestones.description: Three-token model (pETH, pUSD, POLAR) with immutable code design and uncorrelated yield from protocol revenues.
